content_en:
The Messenger of Allah (8) passed by Aboo Hurayrah (#) while he was planting something and said:

‘O Aboo Hurayrah, shall I not show you a planting better than this?’

He said:’Of course, O Messenger of Allah’.

He Bate said: ‘Say:.. il Yi i) V5 ai Saaliy cal Gite aa ails

.. subhaan allaah, al-hamdu lillaah, laa ilaaha illallaah, al,laahu akbar...

.. and a tree will be planted | for you in Paradise for every one you say’.

0 Allah protects His Servant and distances the Shaytaan from him for that night and he is kept safe from evil and harm.

O)} The servant ends his day in the remembrance of Allah, in obedience to Him, with trust on Him, seeking help from Him and affirming His Oneness.

This is what has been made easy in this compilation of the daily Sunan. We ask Allah to allow us to lives according to the Sunnah of the Messenger Muhammad (4) and to die on them.

And our last call is all praises and thanks are for Allah, the Lord of the Worlds.
